prompt: Order these philosophical events from earliest to latest

events.title: Buddha starts teaching
events.fact: -500 BC — Siddhartha Gautama begins teaching in ancient India

events.title: Socrates sentenced to death
events.fact: -399 BC — executed by drinking hemlock in Athens

events.title: Aristotle founds the Lyceum
events.fact: -350 BC — Aristotle establishes school in Athens

events.title: Descartes publishes Meditations
events.fact: 1641 — René Descartes publishes Meditations on First Philosophy

events.title: Locke publishes Essay
events.fact: 1690 — John Locke details early empiricism theory

events.title: Kant publishes Critique
events.fact: 1781 — Immanuel Kant details theory of transcendental idealism

events.title: Nietzsche writes Zarathustra
events.fact: 1883 — Friedrich Nietzsche introduces the Overman concept
